_comment: Copy this file to config.json (or ~/.poh-miner/config.json). This is the current recommended format used by both CLI and the Electron GUI (onboarding + RPC settings).
_model_comment: Inference runs in-process via QVAC. `model` is a QVAC model id/alias (qwen3-0.6b, qwen3-1.7b, qwen3-4b, qwen3-8b) or a GGUF URL. No Ollama.
_comment_skills: Public skill deploy fee: 100 POH (escrowed for code_audit). Graduation staking threshold: 1,000 POH total.
_comment_ipfs: Local IPFS (Kubo) auto-starts to back up chain + brain state. Binary auto-downloads to ~/.poh-miner/bin on first run; repo in ~/.poh-miner/ipfs. Gateway is 8081 to avoid the bootnode's 8080. Set autoStart:false or env POH_SKIP_IPFS=1 to disable.
_comment_genesisAlloc: Optional: pre-fund addresses at block 0 on a clean network start. Amounts in raw POH (1 POH = 1000000000 raw). Only applied once when chain is empty.
